meta.title: La Saveur Colombienne | Colombian Restaurant in Sainte-Rose
meta.description: La Saveur Colombienne serves Colombian comfort food, pickup, delivery, table requests, and catering in Sainte-Rose, Laval.

hero.copy: Family-style Colombian classics, hearty soups, empanadas, lechona, and catering from the Maldonado family kitchen.

story.title: Colombian cooking that feels generous from the first bite.
story.copy: Come for golden empanadas, warming soups, lechona, cazuela, plantains, and family-style trays made for sharing at the table or taking home.

menu.title: The restaurant's current full menu.
menu.copy: Dishes and prices scraped from La Saveur Colombienne's official ordering system.
menu.note: Prices may change in the ordering system.

order.title: Order, reserve, or plan the next celebration.
order.copy: Choose pickup or delivery for today, call the restaurant, or send details for a table, family tray, or catered meal.
order.card1Copy: Choose DoorDash, SkipTheDishes, or Uber Eats to start a delivery order.
order.card2Copy: Share your party size, date, time, and notes so the team can confirm availability.
order.card3Copy: Ask about trays and larger Colombian meals for birthdays, office lunches, and family events.

delivery.title: Order with your preferred platform.
delivery.copy: Availability, fees, and delivery times are managed by each delivery service.
delivery.label: Delivery platforms

reserve.title: A practical guest request flow.
reserve.copy: Send the details guests usually share by phone, then confirm the request directly with the restaurant.

form.name: Name
form.notesPlaceholder: Occasion, allergies, family tray details, or preferred language

footer.copy: Colombian restaurant and catering in Sainte-Rose.
